headline: AI coding workflows lead the window as web scraping, debugging, and code generation tooling break out together.
body: AI coding, web scraping, and debugging all broke out this window, anchored by content framing AI pair programming and the limits of fully generated code. Claude Code productivity tactics drew attention through "power phrases" and custom agentic OS builds layering memory, observability, and skills customization. New tooling entrants surfaced on the developer side: react-call for prop drilling and layout isolation, plus a judge model and ensemble methods in OpenRouter's Fusion compound API, which tested inconsistently against Fable-level claims. Recursive self-improvement also moved via Codex's /goal Ralph loop that autonomously plans, executes, and tests code.
